calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Continued To Oct-18-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Mercedes A. Gavin, Esq. for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Company.
No appearances by the Defendant: Christopher Nurse and Defaulted Co-Defendant: Knox Sowers.
09:15 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Johanna Saine, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Three day notice dtd. 9-9-04----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Rental Agreement ---------------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 1115-H Keppler Court, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Back rent and per diem damages $3,296.32
Attorney's fees $400.00
Costs $390.30, for a total of $4,086.62
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Off Calendar
